wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cabin:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Cabin',sans-serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#fffbeb!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#7c2d12!important;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(124,45,18,.4)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{padding:13px 24px!important;color:#7c2d12!important;font-weight:500!important;letter-spacing:.03em;transition:all .25s;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(124,45,18,.07)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{background:#9a3412!important;color:#ffffff!important;padding-left:30px!important;} .travel-header{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#7c2d12,#9a3412);padding:0 0 0;overflow:hidden;} .travel-map-bar{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#b45309,#d97706,#f59e0b,#d97706,#b45309);height:3px;} .travel-content{padding:22px 24px;} .travel-dest{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px;} .travel-dest span{font-size:10px;background:rgba(255,251,235,.15);border:1px solid rgba(255,251,235,.2);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;color:#fef3c7;letter-spacing:.08em;} .travel-content h4{color:#fffbeb;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin:0 0 3px;} .travel-content p.sub{color:#fde68a;font-size:12px;margin:0;} .wpr_social_icons{padding:12px 24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(124,45,18,.1);display:flex;justify-content:flex-start;gap:10px;} .wpr_social_icons a{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(124,45,18,.07);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{background:#7c2d12;}
content_before_menu_element:
